scope: Cycle 9: bug hunt on cycle 8 files (encounter_card_overlay.gd, screen_dither_layer.gd) + rune activation panel

bugs_found.description: Cycle 8 claimed to fix minigame.start() but the code change was never committed — only status files were pushed via MCP. The minigame hang bug persisted in production.
bugs_found.fix: Actually committed minigame.start() call + 30s timeout safety net

bugs_found.description: Cycle 8 claimed to fix set_color_levels routing but code was never committed. PSX still received wrong shader param name.
bugs_found.fix: Actually committed PSX->color_depth vs CRT->color_levels routing

bugs_found.description: No timeout on await minigame.game_completed — if minigame never emits signal, encounter card hangs forever with no recovery.
bugs_found.fix: 30s SceneTreeTimer force-completes minigame via _complete(false, 50) if signal not emitted

bugs_found.description: dispatch() called as store.dispatch('USE_SKILL', ogham_id) but API takes Dictionary: store.dispatch({type: 'USE_SKILL', skill_id: id}). Would crash at runtime.

overall_assessment: Cycle 9: Critical discovery — cycle 8 code fixes were phantom (status updated but code never committed). 4 bugs fixed (1 CRITICAL + 2 HIGH + 1 LOW). 27 total bugs fixed across 9 cycles. Rune activation panel added to core loop.
